_note: PREVIEW-ONLY sample operational records used to demonstrate the live comment/completion UI. Not client content. Production uses the tenant-authorized operational store.

comments.title: Handled-state green — recommended fix
comments.description: Third i recommends locking the handled-state green in Scene F05 to the approved success color so the Status, Tasks, and Credit completion checks read consistently across all three cards. We will apply this in post once you confirm — no action needed from you.

comments.title: Can the filing object read a touch faster in F02?
comments.description: The descent feels slightly long against the 3-second window — worth testing a quicker settle.

comments.title: Please confirm we can show the live Status field
comments.description: We want to be sure the Status update shown is an approved, showable function before the demo goes wider.

comments.title: Locked script reads great — approved from our side
comments.description: The 45-word voiceover lands the integration message clearly.
comments.completionNote: Confirmed — script remains locked at 45 words / 22 seconds.
